glossary.requiredParams: orderType, orderNumber, ticketNumber, requestedStartTime, actualStartTime, url
glossary.subject: Spark ticket {{ mappings.ticketNumber }} requested and created date is different for {{ mappings.orderType }} order (No: {{ mappings.orderNumber }})
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

Spark ticket for {{ mappings.orderType }} created date {{ mappings.actualStartTime }} is different from requested date {{ mappings.requestedStartTime }} due to either CI conflicts or bank holidays or freeze period.

Order no: {{ mappings.orderNumber }}

Ticket no: {{ mappings.ticketNumber }}

Please check the {{ mappings.url }} with the order number for more information.

Thank You
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
